message: Jake
Cindy
Tim
came to meet but,
it seems
he's not home either. It's disappointing, but it looks like I'll have to come back.
Oh, Detective, hello!
Wow, you're in a pretty good mood. Does that mean
you passed?
Well, that's something you'll have to ask
her about.
Welcome, I was bored all by myself.
Look at
Talk to
Listen to
Think about
Move to
System
The surroundings
about
Gloria
Her mother
about

Exit the game
It's still a room with nothing in it.
If he passes the audition, he could move to a better room,
but it seems she's not too bothered by it, though there's no room that suits her less.
The owner of the room.
Although I can't see her figure,
it's actually more convenient for me; I don't have a good impression of him.
In the room, there's just a single bed, and besides that, only a table and a chair. I wonder if he's really living with just this?
Looks like she's finished with the audition and isn't stressed anymore; today, she has a refreshed look.
Even in this room, which is quite mismatched with her world, somehow she doesn’t feel out of place.
Is her ability to blend in anywhere due to her talent as an actress?
Waiting alone in the room for
her to come back must be tough for a 16-year-old girl. She probably can't even walk around the city.
By the way, I heard you got a call.
Yeah, it’s about that deadline, right?
So, did you reach a conclusion?
Well, kinda.
Hey, did you get scolded a lot?
Huh?
That's because, um, about my birth parents.
Why?
Because I made them wait a lot, you know? If it was a request to meet as soon as possible, I’d feel bad.
It's okay.
Oh, I'm glad.
Huff.
Ah, I'm bad at thinking about difficult things.
Well then, I'll contact you when it's decided, so please take care.
You don’t have to remind me; I won’t run away anymore.
Okay, got it.
Thanks, detective.
I hope I can say that deciding was a good thing.
Is he not here today either?
The audition's technically over, but he went somewhere. It's terrible to leave such a cute girl behind, isn’t it?
Maybe she's gotten mad.
Because I had her take that band audition.
That can't be true. I think it was a good experience for him, no matter the form it took.
I wish you could think that way.
I wonder when he’ll come back.
Does Gloria not know this place?
I don't think she does, right? We haven't told her, and before,
it was a different place where.
I know it's nosy, but if there's something you want to tell her, it’s better to say it clearly for both of you.
If she’s someone you can talk to, then that's what I’d do.
But our relationship is a bit tricky.
Let’s not talk about Gloria anymore.
Hey, what’s my biological mother like?
Uh.
Mhm.
Could she be a total ugly?
No, she’s a very beautiful person.
Phew.
Oh, I see.
My mom, huh.
I wonder if I look like her, after all.
It would be bad if I said I didn’t want to meet here, right?
Eh,　really?
Well, I can’t force you since I'm not in a position to do so.
Oh, no no, don’t take that seriously! I will meet her, I will. I decided to meet my biological mother.
I’m definitely curious about the person who gave birth to me. So, I thought I have to meet her at least once.
Thank you,
I’m sure your mother will be happy.
I still don’t accept her as a mother. It doesn’t change the fact that she abandoned me.
Then,
we have to set a date to meet before your mind changes.
I’m free anytime, so it’s all good with me. Let me know once it’s decided.
If you don’t hurry, you might change your mind, you know? So please contact me.
I wonder if she will actually meet Meryl?
If I found out my mother was none other than Meryl
Shin
I wonder what he would do? Would he quit his job after all?
I haven't seen him lately.
It's strange that he's not around after the auditions.
I can't imagine they’re fighting.
It seems there’s a rift between
Gloria and me that I don’t know about. Is that why
he said he would quit?
If Gloria isn’t working out, he should look for another agent. It’d be such a waste to ruin his career.
Well, will Meryl and
her son get along?
Come hang out again, okay?
